title: CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER - 211info
text: CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES EUGENE CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with clothing, personal hygiene products, diapers, and showers. Helps connect individuals with other community resources and access mainstream benefits, including assistance with SNAP applications and local transit single-ride bus passes (which can be requested twice per month, subject to availability). Also, assists in completing forms to obtain ID and birth certificates, including limited payment assistance. Accepts donations of food, clothing, and other items. 1464 W 6th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 345-3628 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On LTD EmX line; Bus Lines 41 and 43 stop two blocks away on 8th Avenue. On-site parking available. Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Public Assistance Issues Certificates/Forms Assistance Clothing Donation Programs Diapers Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES EUGENE
